DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: Our legacy-to-new-platform migration tool failed at 60% completion with error 'SCHEMA_MISMATCH_v2'. But the situation is worse than a simple failure: (1) 500 users are now in a split state — 300 have been migrated (they can log into the new platform but not the legacy), 200 remain on legacy, and the 300 migrated users report that some of their historical data is MISSING (specifically: audit logs older than 1 year and custom field configurations), (2) we have a contractual deadline next Friday to be fully migrated or we lose our legacy platform access (maintenance contract expires), (3) we can't re-run the migration from scratch because the tool modified data in place on the legacy side during the 60% that completed (it marked records as 'migrated' and some transformations were destructive), (4) our compliance officer is concerned that the missing audit logs may constitute a regulatory violation. We need: a fix for SCHEMA_MISMATCH_v2, recovery of the missing data, a way to complete the remaining 40%, and confirmation that the full dataset will be intact by next Friday.
